Paste these in Railway → soothing-creativity → ai-interview-copilot → Variables → production
Then click Redeploy (or wait for GitHub auto-deploy after push to main).

Required (copy values from your local backend/.env or Resend/Mongo dashboards):

  GEMINI_API_KEY=
  MONGODB_URI=
  MONGODB_DB_NAME=interview_copilot
  JWT_SECRET=              (long random string — NOT "paste-the-long-random-string-here")
  RESEND_API_KEY=
  EMAIL_FROM=Interview Copilot <onboarding@resend.dev>
  OTP_EMAIL_FALLBACK_ENABLED=true

  CORS_ORIGINS=https://ai-interview-co-pilot.netlify.app

Recommended:

  GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-2.5-flash-lite
  MAX_INTERVIEWS_PER_USER_PER_DAY=1
  GLOBAL_GEMINI_DAILY_CAP=40

Remove or leave empty (hybrid needs this unset for colleagues):

  RESEND_ALLOWED_TEST_EMAIL=

Phase 3 — Grafana Cloud observability (see .github/GRAFANA_CLOUD_SETUP.txt):

  OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED=true
  GRAFANA_OTLP_ENDPOINT=https://otlp-gateway-prod-REGION.grafana.net/otlp
  GRAFANA_OTLP_INSTANCE_ID=
  GRAFANA_OTLP_TOKEN=
  OTEL_SERVICE_NAME=ai-interview-copilot-backend
  OTEL_DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT=production
  LOG_LEVEL=INFO
  OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES=service.instance.id=${{RAILWAY_REPLICA_ID}},railway.deployment.id=${{RAILWAY_DEPLOYMENT_ID}}

After Resend domain is Verified:

  EMAIL_FROM=Interview Copilot <noreply@YOURDOMAIN.com>

Do NOT create new Railway projects. Only this service.
